productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Brown Casual Sandals
description: Perfect for those casual outings, these suede and leather sandals from red tape are all you need to pamper your feet with style and comfort. UpperLeather straps covering the forefoot and midfoot for durability and styleA leather loop on the upper middle holding the straps in placePadded ankle strap in leather to lock the foot in place with a velcro closureAll straps have a fabric inner lining and are padded to protect the feet from blistering and to offer breathable comfortPadded footbed with printUpper stitched to the outsole for durabilityOutsoleDurable rubber outsole, curved at the midfoot to offer absolute ergonomic comfortTextured outsole with multi-directional lugs for maximum grip and traction on various surfacesSandal careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineUse a suede brush to remove dust from the suede surfaceDo not store in direct sunlight
